name: mirofish
description: Stakeholder simulation for PR and marketing. Spawns a cast of persona subagents (press, activists, scientists, regulators, customers, investors) in parallel to react to a press release, then synthesizes consensus, disagreement, surprise signals, and coverage gaps. Inspired by Mirofish and Anthropic's multi-agent research system. Ships with a 20-persona Aker BioMarine library that can be swapped out for any industry.
